version_description: My version uses easier chords for beginners. It can be transposed to a lower key by removing the capo.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh, it’s like that[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7[/ch]
I’m your dream come true[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G7[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
When it’s on a platter for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
then you pull back[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]
When I try to make plans[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G7[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
More than two hours in advance[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
I slam the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]
I hit ignore[/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]
I’m saying no no no no more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
I got you blocked[/tab]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]
After this[/tab]
An afterthought
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
I finally cut you off[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
I feel so much lighter[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D7[/ch]

[tab]                [ch]G7[/ch]
with you off my mind[/tab]
